meta.name: Mullusi
meta.description: Public product and research website for Mullusi Symbolic Intelligence.

systems.name: Mullusi Core
systems.summary: Symbolic execution engine, type system, and expression tree evaluator for Mullu.

systems.name: Mullusi Foundation
systems.summary: Formal symbolic blueprints for causality, type theory, Yoneda reasoning, and core semantics.

systems.name: Mullu Control Plane
systems.summary: Governed symbolic work platform: gateway, approvals, traces, budgets, lineage, and deployment controls.

systems.name: SymbolAgent
systems.summary: Governed multi-channel symbolic assistant runtime with deterministic kernel, audit ledger, and channel gateway.

systems.name: MSIC SDK
systems.summary: Mullu Symbolic Intelligence Cell SDK for deterministic governed causal-chain symbolic computation.

systems.name: Mullusi Physics Engine
systems.summary: Symbolic causal physics hypothesis engine that maps regimes, axioms, bridges, open problems, and execution plans.

systems.name: Symbolic Physics Research Engine
systems.summary: Research workspace for symbolic physics reasoning and causal scientific exploration.

systems.name: Phi DNA v2
systems.summary: Phi/DNA symbolic research surface for biological structure, lineage, and causal representation.

systems.name: Glyph Geometry Engine
systems.summary: Geometry layer for glyph-anchored symbolic structures and visual reasoning.

systems.name: Temporal Causal Chain Reasoning
systems.summary: Temporal causal chain reasoning experiments for durable state, sequence, and continuity.

systems.name: Mullu SCC
systems.summary: Symbolic causal chain layer for governance, constraint propagation, and auditable transitions.

systems.name: SCC Harness
systems.summary: Harness for validating symbolic causal chain behavior and closure evidence.

systems.name: SCC Blockchain
systems.summary: Chain-anchored audit and ledger experiments for symbolic causal closure.

systems.name: Mullu Search
systems.summary: Search surface for symbolic systems, repositories, concepts, and governed memory.

systems.name: Mullu Inspect
systems.summary: Inspection surface for traces, states, symbolic transitions, and runtime evidence.

systems.name: Mullu Capsule
systems.summary: Portable symbolic capsule pattern for bounded tasks, memory, and proof packets.

systems.name: Mullu 3D
systems.summary: 3D visualization and spatial interface experiments for symbolic intelligence systems.

systems.name: Tatoken Kernel
systems.summary: Token/kernel layer for symbolic representation, bounded transformation, and causal continuity.

systems.name: General Programming Language
systems.summary: Programming language exploration for symbolic computation and governed execution.

systems.name: Symbolic Causal Chain Machine Language
systems.summary: Machine-language direction for symbolic causal chain operations and formal transition control.

systems.name: Phi Fold
systems.summary: Phi folding operator research for compression, traversal, and governed reasoning state.

systems.name: InceptaDive
systems.summary: Deep traversal operator workspace for symbolic search, recursion, and structured discovery.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Math Engine
futureDomains.summary: Symbolic mathematics engine for proofs, algebraic structures, category-theoretic maps, optimization, and theorem workflow.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Biology Engine
futureDomains.summary: Causal biological structure engine for DNA/protein lineage, phenotype constraints, systems biology, and experiment planning.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Chemistry Engine
futureDomains.summary: Symbolic chemistry layer for reaction graphs, molecular constraints, regime bridges, and lab-safe hypothesis generation.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Music Engine
futureDomains.summary: Symbolic music reasoning engine for rhythm, harmony, scale systems, cultural motifs, composition logic, and audio structure.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Unified Science Lab
futureDomains.summary: Cross-domain bridge layer connecting math, physics, biology, chemistry, and music through governed causal structures.
